summary: Tested all 5 homepage visual/content adjustment tasks on desktop (1920px). All tasks verified as PASSING: (1) Hero microcopy center-aligned, (2) Stats row balanced with 3 blocks, (3) Pricing cards aligned (0px Y difference), (4) 9 reviews in 3x3 grid with correct authors/sources, (5) Explore section with updated subheading and stacked links. Regression tests confirm all links working.

task1_hero_microcopy.details: hero-microcopy-desktop element found with text-align: center. Both lines present: urgency slots line and schedule note line grouped together.

task2_stats_row_balance.details: 3 stat blocks visible on desktop: 22 Cities (numSize 64), $60 Diagnostic (numSize 64), 180-Day Warranty (numSize 36). All blocks have consistent styling with orange left border.

task3_pricing_cards_alignment.details: 3 pricing cards found. All cards aligned at same Y position (y=3291). Max Y difference: 0px. Featured card has 'MOST ASKED' badge with absolute positioning (top: 10px).

task4_reviews_9_in_3x3_grid.details: 9 review cards found with data-testid review-card-0 through review-card-8. Grid template: 3 columns (334.656px each). Authors verified: jennifer mushnick, Ms Tee, Karen Dzienkowski, Gayle Rabbitt, Emily Chen, Michael Kagan, Heather O., Sarah M., James L. Sources: 8 Google, 1 Thumbtack.

task5_explore_section_copy.details: Subheading updated to 'Browse popular repair services and local service area pages across the Bay Area.' Links 'View all service areas' and 'Marin County Appliance Repair' on separate lines (flex-direction: column).

regression_links.details: All navigation links working. Hero Book/Call buttons functional. Service cards link correctly. 20 review links found. 27 explore section links verified.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 homepage visual adjustment tasks completed and verified on desktop (1920px). HomeHero.jsx and ProfessionalLandingPage.js contain the changes. Review data uses hardcoded fallback array (9 reviews) since API returns 0 reviews. No issues found.
